text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->closed

This issue has been resolved with the following commit: 

http://www.freshports.org/commit.php?category=lang&port=gcc42&files=yes&message_id=201004161609.o3GG9FfZ047391@repoman.freebsd.org 

Also, pdftk will be changed in the near future to compile with gcj45 
instead of gcj42.
